text:
HA1lT392
This is a female's chart. She
happens to be a second wife. Fear in Moon Dt.
terferes with her marital happiness.
Mars-representing husband has to
Mars Yen.
cross the Moon and Ketu before com
ing in contact with Venus. Hence she
will be the second wife. The native Jupt.
will be devotional in nature.
Sat. Sun
Mars contacts the Moon first
Db. Mer.
(sweet) and Venus in the Moon's
house after crossing Ketu (sour). So the husband will deal in articles which are
sweet and sour and will earn his livelihood through them. She will have
children, conveyances and all comforts and live upto a good old age of 63.
CHART 393
In this case, Mars is all alone
with no planet on either side. He is
Dt.
aspected by Jupiter hemmed in be
Moon tween enemies Venus and Mercury on
. Mars either side. As a result, the marriage of
Yen.
the native will be delayed. His health
also will not be good. The younger
Jupt.
brother will get married first (Venus in
Sat. Sun the 11th to Mercury). The brother will
